JUNSU KIM Hi, I am the one of Ph.D candidates who falls in love with computer things! I am looking for an opportunity to conduct research my interests. Thanks.
  • home

22 JUN 2020 • interest

RESEARCH INTEREST

I am interested in the fields of memory and storage systems and computer architecture that are closely related to building a data-centric system. Also, I would like to adopt machine learning to the aforementioned fields. Through my research, I hope that future computers overcome the fundamental latency problem.

21 JUN 2020 • education

EDUCATION

Bachelor of Electronic Engineering [Mar 2014 - Feb 2021]

  • Hanyang University, Seoul (Korea, Republic of)

  • Overall GPA : 3.79/4.00 (Weighted GPA : 3.94/4.00)
  • Hanyang University Scholarship - Full Tuition (7 Semesters)

Graduation Project

19 JUN 2020 • projects

Aceelerating Deeplearning Workloads using Compiler

  • Conducted in Cass Lab in Hanyang University, Advised by Prof. Yongjun Park

  • Idea : Automatically generates optimal computation graphs for inference on CPU

  • Observated TASO(SOSP, 2019) was not able to generate optimal computation graphs for CPU

20 JUN 2019 • projects

CAPTCHA PROJECT : Building a Machine Reads Distorted Text

  • Achieved 99% of the accuracy

  • Problem : A small train set which caused overfitting and low accuracy

  • Idea : Used data augmentation and Transfer Learning to avoid overfitting while increasing the accuracy

  • Result :

20 MAY 2019 • projects

Implementing HDL Programs in FPGA

  • Trained using Verilog : FIR Filter, Mealy and Moore machine design

  • Implemented LED controller and seven segment controller in FPGA

  • Implemented VGA controller in FPGA

19 MAY 2019 • projects

Embedded System Software Design (Used Achro 210T Board

  • Cross compiled bootloader and kernel & implemented them in the device

  • Coded the LED controller which controlled LEDs on the device

  • Displayed image files using frame buffer
